evals.prompt: Build a hero section for the DevFest 2026 Quito homepage with the event title, date (26 Sept 2026), venue, a Register CTA, and developer glyph decorations in the background.
evals.expected_output: A React Server Component using Section/Container, DevFest palette tokens (not legacy orange), location pill below wordmark, mono glyphs as aria-hidden decor, and accessible Image/CTA markup.

evals.prompt: Review components/sections/home-hero.tsx and components/ui/cta-button.tsx for DevFest 2026 brand compliance. List every violation in file:line format.
evals.expected_output: Terse audit flagging legacy #e8551c CTA colors, missing location badge, non-DevFest glyphs/copy, and any hardcoded hex outside the official palette.

evals.prompt: Add DevFest 2026 brand color tokens to app/globals.css and create a speaker card component with photo, name (2-line target), and talk title — use pastel green background with core green accents.
evals.expected_output: globals.css updated with --devfest-* variables and @theme inline mappings; new SpeakerCard component using token classes only, proper Image dimensions, and typography line limits.
